title: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo. Detailed analysis of pricing, features, and best use cases for email marketing.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo: The Complete Comparison
intro: ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels at comprehensive automation and CRM functionality, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce marketing. This guide helps you choose the right tool based on your business model and requirements.

comparison_table.tool_b: Freemium, free tier up to 500 subscribers, paid from $45/month

comparison_table.tool_a: Lead scoring, site tracking, dynamic content, CRM integration
comparison_table.tool_b: Predictive analytics, e-commerce integrations, SMS, reviews

choose_a_if: You need a unified CRM and email marketing solution with advanced lead scoring
You require extensive automation workflows beyond standard email sequences
You want an affiliate program to generate additional revenue
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business on Shopify or WooCommerce
You want to start with a free tier before upgrading
You need predictive analytics and customer review management built-in

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring comprehensive CRM and complex automation, while Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands. ActiveCampaign has a higher G2 rating for overall functionality, but Klaviyo offers a free tier that makes it more accessible for startups.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Klaviyo is cheaper if you're starting out, offering a free tier for up to 500 subscribers. However, ActiveCampaign's $15/month entry point is lower than Klaviyo's $45/month paid plan. The best choice depends on your subscriber count and growth trajectory.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data migration. You can typically export your subscriber lists, segments, and automation workflows, though you may need to rebuild some workflows due to platform differences. Consider working with migration specialists for complex setups to ensure data integrity.
